description: Tasks template for .NET 10.0 upgrade plan. This file tracks individual upgrade tasks for migrating dotnet-demo-s3 from .NET 6.0 to .NET 10.0 LTS.

tasks.description: Update the project target framework from net6.0 to net10.0
tasks.requirements: Change the TargetFramework property in dotnet-demo-s3.csproj from net6.0 to net10.0. This is the primary framework upgrade step that enables access to .NET 10.0 APIs and runtime features.

Update the PackageReference for Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration in dotnet-demo-s3.csproj to version 10.0.3 to align with the target framework. This package provides core configuration functionality with no breaking changes between versions.

Update the PackageReference for Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Json in dotnet-demo-s3.csproj to version 10.0.3 to align with the target framework. This package enables JSON configuration file support with full backward compatibility.

tasks.description: Restore NuGet dependencies after framework and package updates
tasks.requirements: Execute 'dotnet restore dotnet-demo-s3.csproj' to download and restore all package dependencies. Verify that all 4 packages (including AWS SDK packages) restore successfully without conflicts.

tasks.description: Build the solution with .NET 10.0 to verify compilation success
tasks.requirements: Execute 'dotnet build dotnet-demo-s3.csproj --configuration Release' to compile the project with the new target framework. Ensure zero compilation errors and zero warnings. This validates that all code is compatible with .NET 10.0.

tasks.description: Perform manual functional testing of S3 operations
tasks.requirements: Execute the application and manually test all S3 functionality: configuration loading, AWS credential detection, bucket listing, file upload operations, file download operations, and error handling. Verify the application starts without exceptions and exits cleanly.

tasks.description: Commit all upgrade changes to the upgrade branch
tasks.requirements: Stage the modified dotnet-demo-s3.csproj file and commit with message: 'Upgrade to .NET 10.0 LTS - Update target framework from net6.0 to net10.0 - Upgrade Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration to 10.0.3 - Upgrade Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Json to 10.0.3 - Verify AWS SDK packages compatible with .NET 10.0. All builds pass, manual testing complete.' Include Co-authored-by trailer for Copilot.
